system.effect: The psyker causes the target to burst into flame from within. The target suffers 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with the Flame quality, ignoring armour. If the target takes damage, it must pass an Agility test or catch fire.

description.value: The psyker reaches out with his mind and ignites the very molecules within his target's body, causing them to spontaneously combust. The target suffers 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with the Flame quality, ignoring armour. If the target suffers damage, it must pass an Agility test or catch on fire. Flammable materials on the target's person may also ignite.
